installConfigs.instructions: Replace <gitlab-personal-access-token> with a GitLab personal access token that has the 'api' scope (or 'read_api' for read-only). The token is sent as 'Authorization: Bearer <token>'. For self-managed GitLab, change the serverUrl to https://<your-gitlab-host>/api/v4/mcp.

Replace <gitlab-personal-access-token> with a GitLab personal access token that has the 'api' scope (or 'read_api' for read-only). The token is sent as 'Authorization: Bearer <token>'. For self-managed GitLab, change the serverUrl to https://<your-gitlab-host>/api/v4/mcp.
